name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Georgia sits at a crossroads.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
On Tuesday, I debate my Republican opponent for the first time, and Georgia voters will see two very different visions for our state. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa70a/34a064cc/17fcba9/70d71dd/3450264611/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, On Tuesday, I debate my Republican opponent for the first time, and Georgia voters will see two very different visions for our state. Brian Kemp's Georgia is a state where partisan politics supersedes the needs of the people. It is a state where 500,000 Georgians continue to go without access to health care, and rural hospitals continue to shutter their doors. His is a state where you can be fired from your job for who love, where discriminatory laws will wield religion as a weapon of hate. Kemp's Georgia is one where voting is a privilege, not a right. Where false promises leave teachers without the resources they need and where "campus carry" puts our children in danger. **I've said it before and I'll say it again: Elections are about choices, and the choice Georgia voters face could not be more clear.** Our Georgia will expand Medicaid and fight for rural communities. By embracing, celebrating, and defending our diversity, we will make our Georgia a better place to do business and raise a family - for every family. Our Georgia will value public education and expand opportunity so more Georgians can follow their dreams and unlock our full potential. But all that depends on what happens leading up to November 6th. My opponent will continue to throw attack after attack at us to see what sticks. We must fight twice as hard if we're going to succeed in building the Georgia of the future. **[Our hard-fought victories- for civil rights, for equality, for progress - are not permanent. We have to fight every single day - not simply to move forward, but also to avoid moving backwards. That is what's at stake in November. Please, chip in $3 to help us write the next chapter of Georgia's future.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa70a/34a064cc/17fcba9/70d71da/3450264611/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDIxMjAxOC4zLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10212018.3-full")** Make no mistake: "Our Georgia" is not a pipe dream. We have the power to transform our lives. And we have witnessed too many surprise victories and shocking political upsets this year to let cynicism or doubt cloud our vision or steer us off course. We know that our Georgia is better than Kemp's Georgia - but we cannot prove him wrong until we prove ourselves right. That means doubling down on our efforts, knocking on more doors, chipping in a few more dollars, driving a few more people to the polls, and doing everything we can to fight for our Georgia. The next **16 days** won't be easy. But if we all fight with all we've got now, we will wake up on November 7th ready to build the brighter, stronger Georgia our families deserve. Yours in that fight, Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa70a/34a064cc/17fcba9/70d71da/3450264611/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDIxMjAxOC4zLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10212018.3-full")**

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**SUNDAY, OCTOBER 21st**
|
---
**_A Note From Wayne_**
Dear Derek,
Another week closer to the midterm elections, another great week for our Republican candidates.
In forums and interviews, our Republican candidates for Congress - Eddie Edwards and Steve Negron - greatly outshined Democrats Chris Pappas and Ann Kuster.
Governor Sununu continues to hold a sizable lead over Democrat Molly Kelly, and recent polls show that the Granite State wants to send Republicans back to Concord to the Executive Council, Senate, and House.
**We just need to seal the deal. **
[Sign up to volunteer](nh.gop/action), [get your tickets to our Rally Reception](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSKxj0A5PmSSFIFlGoijO1Ro-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MZbJTb-2FWdpiGVjKRdsaJEp8rmXin7L4xnPXG8Cjx4OmDC0s31w7W8vuw-2FtvtF7Ft0-2BIi-2FTqcixEIEJgevDVUYSedhwdvF1VTrrTJaOAhiqV-2Bmng8DITeyOJJ6pLEyWJSCdQ5arhg2-2BpMi0iP24WzvhqBvebvU6nxkHwj-2BFgDg88pGVOonA-2BKhRDC4y2sfqQcPBv5GDN7zgD8mJNgkwpq4rZ7DyG9lAl51HC2bmMACWB3TwD60GzG6VHF770jVEuChy3H036Y4zWKy1-2FgPyGA0pw-3D-3D), clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER SUNDAY, OCTOBER 21st | A Note From Wayne Dear Derek, Another week closer to the midterm elections, another great week for our Republican candidates. In forums and interviews, our Republican candidates for Congress - Eddie Edwards and Steve Negron - greatly outshined Democrats Chris Pappas and Ann Kuster. Governor Sununu continues to hold a sizable lead over Democrat Molly Kelly, and recent polls show that the Granite State wants to send Republicans back to Concord to the Executive Council, Senate, and House. We just need to seal the deal. nh.gop/action, , and do what you can on and to secure Republican victories in just over two weeks. Together, we're building a stronger Republican Party - and a stronger New Hampshire. Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. NH.GOP/LEADRIGHT EVENT SPOTLIGHT NHGOP PRESS THIS WEEK PHOTO OF THE WEEK The University of New Hampshire College Republicans held a great phone bank for Governor Chris Sununu and our Republican ticket this week! Go Wildcats, go! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our spotlight this week shines on Josh Caruso! Josh is a Senior Political Science major at Saint Anselm! Josh has been a key member of our #LeadRight team, and has been crushing it on doors and on the phone for Republicans up and down the ballot. Thank you for all you do, Josh! name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: FW: 📺 WATCH: our new ad 📺
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It's Sunday evening, so I won't take too much of your time. But I want to make sure you have a chance to watch our newest television ad, because its message is important.
Friends, It's Sunday evening, so I won't take too much of your time. But I want to make sure you have a chance to watch our newest television ad, because its message is important. I am proud to stand with Arizona seniors. I will always protect Social Security, critical benefits that our seniors have earned through years of hard work. Wendy Rogers is so out of touch that she wants to take all that away. I won't stand for it, friends. [**Please watch our new ad and chip in to support our campaign if you can, because I 'm counting on you to finish strong.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleran-work?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.21_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Yours, Tom \-----forwarded message----- From: Team O'Halleran Subject: 📺WATCH: our new ad 📺 Team, Yesterday, we shared the news that a Republican Super PAC has released a poll claiming that our race is now a tie. And we promised you that we would keep fighting to make sure voters know what's at stake in this election. Well, we're keeping our promise. We're happy to share [**our latest television advertisement**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleran-work?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.21_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer="), which lays out the clear contrast between Tom's independent record and Wendy Rogers's extremism. Specifically, it's about Tom's promise to protect Social Security, _and Rogers 's pledge to eliminate it._ _**[Take a minute to watch, team, and then make a grassroots donation if you can, so we can share this ad with every last voter in our district:](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleran-work?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.21_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ [](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleran-work?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.21_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") We're proud of this ad, team, because it makes the choice in this race very clear. We can re-elect Tom -- an independent public servant who stands with our seniors -- or elect someone who will take away the benefits they've earned. We know who's better for Arizona. [**Watch the ad, and please chip in afterward -- because we need your help to make sure we can keep this important message on the air.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleran-work?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.21_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleran-work?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.21_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonians. Thanks for having Tom's back!

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Homeland Security Warns of Cartels’ Role in Migrant Caravan
body:
| |
---
# _Homeland Security Warns of Cartels’ Role in Migrant Caravan_
“Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen warned Sunday that the illegal immigrant caravan heading toward the U.S. could be exploited by cartels that control most of the illegal flow of people through Latin America,” Stephen Dinan reports for _The Washington Times_. “While we closely monitor the caravan crisis, we must remain mindful of the transnational criminal organizations and other criminals that prey on the vulnerabilities of those undertaking the irregular migration journey,” Secretary Nielsen said in a statement. **[Click here to read more.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTU1MTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU1NTE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzOTQ1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/21/kirstjen-nielsen-warns-cartels-role-migrant-carava/)** “As the massive migrant caravan pushes toward the southern U.S. border, a second group of about 1,000 people from Honduras is rushing to join the main group -- which reportedly has swelled its ranks with several people who've already been deported. The caravan, which has around 5,000 to 7,000 members, was on the move again Monday morning, departing the southern Mexico city of Tapachula,” Greg Norman reports in **[Fox News](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTU1MTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU1NTE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzOTQ1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.foxnews.com/world/second-migrant-caravan-new-group-rushes-to-join-ranks-deportees-vow-return-to-america)**. “The United States, as we have said many times, cares for the Palestinian people and wants to help, but we will not empower a regime that launches attacks on Israeli kindergartens. The threats and violent behavior of Hamas prevent the international community from being able to ease the humanitarian situation in Gaza,” Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt writes in [**_The Jerusalem Post_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTU1MTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU1NTE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzOTQ1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.jpost.com/Opinion/Jason-Greenblatt-There-is-a-path-for-Gaza-569793). In _**[The Hill](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTU1MTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU1NTE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzOTQ1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://thehill.com/opinion/energy-environment/412332-americas-energy-dominance-is-a-remarkable-achievement)**_ , Mike Palicz writes that “President Trump’s commitment to creating an energy-dominant America continues to roll on at full speed,” with the United States passing Saudi Arabia and Russia as the world’s largest crude oil producer. “President Obama wrongly believed that creating an energy independent America required a drastic shift away from oil as a source of energy for Americans. It was the pursuit of this policy that for years hindered the growth of our nation’s energy sector.” “White House senior adviser Ivanka Trump told the [_**Washington Examiner**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTU1MTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU1NTE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzOTQ1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/ivanka-trump-us-will-reach-its-full-potential-when-women-are-economically-empowered) Friday the United States will only reach its full potential when women are ‘economically empowered,’” Anna Giaritelli writes. “This administration’s economic agenda is centered on growth and job creation and we recognize that only when women are economically empowered to thrive, will our families, our economies, and our societies reach their fullest potential,” Ms. Trump said.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTU1MTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU1NTE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzOTQ1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTU1MTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU1NTE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzOTQ1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTU1MTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU1NTE0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAzOTQ1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
---

The turnout at our rallies, the energy that we see in every community in
Texas, the excitement and commitment that people from all walks of life

I’m as encouraged, as hopeful, as I’ve ever been.

Today is the first day of Early Voting in Texas. We need to make sure that

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: protect Medicare (not asking for money)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1e0/2a380d31/36917b8e/f1685e/576361203/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1e0/2a380d31/36917b8e/f1685e/576361203/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Wanted to make sure you didn't miss this, everyone.
Mitch McConnell indicated that he will cut Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid if Republicans keep control of the Senate after the election.
Dismantling Medicare would rob older Americans and the most vulnerable among us of the care they need to get and stay healthy. That's unacceptable.
[**Please sign our petition and tell Mitch McConnell and other Republicans in Congress to protect susceptible Americans and stop attacking Medicare.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1e0/2a380d31/36917b8e/f1685f/576361203/VEsF/ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/medicare-hassan")
Look, for millions of people nationwide, Medicare is their only source of health care coverage. Destroying it would be a direct threat to the livelihoods of women and families.
The best way to protect Medicare and ensure that hardworking people don't lose access to the health care they need is to make your voice heard.
[**Join people from across the country and call on far-right Republicans not to undo this critical health care program.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1e0/2a380d31/36917b8e/f1685f/576361203/VEsC/ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/medicare-hassan")
Thanks for speaking up,
Team Maggie

name: Jessalyn Reid, Tim Kaine Digital Director
subject: A step by step guide to sending Corey Stewart away - or, why I started a weekly donation to my own boss, Tim Kaine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, so last week I was donating to Tim Kaine in order to test out a feature on one of our contribution forms. And then my eyes drifted to the "Make it weekly" checkbox. Almost without thinking, my hand had checked the box (seriously). Why? [Because I am NOT going to sit around and let Corey Stewart get anywhere close to the Senate.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10d1/3e0906/77692421/3e37d829/228681724/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-stewart-fundraising?refcode=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Because+I+am+NOT+going+to+sit+around+and&utm_campaign=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&source=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10d1/3e0906/77692421/3e37d828/228681724/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-stewart-fundraising?refcode=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&source=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND") **And now, I 'm really, really glad I started that weekly donation. Because the third quarter FEC reports are out, and Corey Stewart raised over _a million dollars_ from July to September.**

What else was he doing in that time? Glad you asked:
* **July: Corey Stewart defended Roy Moore (seriously).**
_When a reporter asked why he would skip a vote on opioid prevention to campaign for Alabama Senate candidate Roy Moore, who is a credibly accused child predator and said America was "great" during slavery, Corey Stewart said it was because he believed him - not his accusers._

* **August: Corey Stewart doubled down on offensive Charlottesville comments.**
_In 2017, Corey Stewart agreed with President Trump that there were "very fine people, on both sides" in Charlottesville. In 2018, he doubled down that - and said it's time for us to just "move on" from that horrific hate rally that cost three people their lives._

* **September: Corey Stewart likened serious sexual assault to pulling a girl 's pigtails.**
_When Dr. Christine Blasey Ford came forward with her very serious, very credible charges against Justice Brett Kavanaugh, Corey Stewart tweeted, "What else did Judge Kavanaugh do - pull a girl's pigtail in 1st Grade?"_

Now it's October, and the latest from Corey Stewart isn't another shocking comment -- it's a shocking number: $1,004,562.75. That's how much money this guy raised during those three months he spent trampling on Virginia values.

**As for[November?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10d1/3e0906/77692421/3e37d82f/228681724/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-stewart-fundraising?refcode=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+November&utm_campaign=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&source=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND") Well, we don't know what's going to happen. Because it all depends on what we do in the next two and a half weeks.**

So I'm coming to work every day for Tim Kaine, and I'm keeping my weekly contribution on the books. I'll probably even donate a few more times in the next 15 days. Because I refuse to leave this up to chance. I hope you'll join me. [Maybe it's a weekly donation like mine, or maybe just the $5 you can afford today - but please, click this donate button, dig deep, and contribute whatever you can afford:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10d1/3e0906/77692421/3e37d82e/228681724/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-stewart-fundraising?refcode=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Maybe+itrsquos+a+weekly+donation+like+mi&utm_campaign=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&source=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10d1/3e0906/77692421/3e37d82d/228681724/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-stewart-fundraising?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&source=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND")
---
| [**DONATE $25**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10d1/3e0906/77692421/3e37d82c/228681724/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-stewart-fundraising?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND&source=20181022_1_FR_JR_weekly-LDND")

clean_body: | | Derek, so last week I was donating to Tim Kaine in order to test out a feature on one of our contribution forms. And then my eyes drifted to the "Make it weekly" checkbox. Almost without thinking, my hand had checked the box (seriously). Why? "" "" And now, I 'm really, really glad I started that weekly donation. Because the third quarter FEC reports are out, and Corey Stewart raised over a million dollars from July to September. What else was he doing in that time? Glad you asked: July: Corey Stewart defended Roy Moore (seriously). When a reporter asked why he would skip a vote on opioid prevention to campaign for Alabama Senate candidate Roy Moore, who is a credibly accused child predator and said America was "great" during slavery, Corey Stewart said it was because he believed him - not his accusers. August: Corey Stewart doubled down on offensive Charlottesville comments. In 2017, Corey Stewart agreed with President Trump that there were "very fine people, on both sides" in Charlottesville. In 2018, he doubled down that - and said it's time for us to just "move on" from that horrific hate rally that cost three people their lives. September: Corey Stewart likened serious sexual assault to pulling a girl 's pigtails. When Dr. Christine Blasey Ford came forward with her very serious, very credible charges against Justice Brett Kavanaugh, Corey Stewart tweeted, "What else did Judge Kavanaugh do - pull a girl's pigtail in 1st Grade?" Now it's October, and the latest from Corey Stewart isn't another shocking comment -- it's a shocking number: $1,004,562.75. That's how much money this guy raised during those three months he spent trampling on Virginia values. As for "" Well, we don't know what's going to happen. Because it all depends on what we do in the next two and a half weeks. So I'm coming to work every day for Tim Kaine, and I'm keeping my weekly contribution on the books. I'll probably even donate a few more times in the next 15 days. Because I refuse to leave this up to chance. I hope you'll join me. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Millions of Virginians are counting on us to defeat Corey Stewart. Thank you for doing your part (and doing it again and again). It means so much. "" -Jess Jessalyn Reid Digital Director, TK 2018 P.S. I appreciate you taking the time to read this email. If you have any friends or family who you think should see it too, I hope you'll forward it to them. None of us can sit on the sidelines for this final stretch. "" | "" "" ""

name: Team Mel
subject: South Bend Tribune endorses Mel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friend,

This is big: the _South Bend Tribune_ endorsed Mel this weekend, saying he's right on health care and will be a transparent and accountable representative.

We have just two weeks to spread the word about this endorsement, friend. Can we count on your help?

**Share the _South Bend Tribune_ 's editorial with your friends and family now, and encourage them to vote for Mel.**

**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.myngp.com/el/0jdKsddHQ1fRYwcBZGiovtAW0tyAAG16UpW2oG-UNCs=/NOk_BXZ5waS55hMgDZ3JH4TenThK38zqhhrM4893Gcw=) | [SPREAD THE WORD ON TWITTER](https://act.myngp.com/el/0jdKsddHQ1fRYwcBZGiovtAW0tyAAG16UpW2oG-UNCs=/E_OzrrgSdlyAQV6gFQvBgYeUh6qnc7J1igqtQG6Z3T0=)**

The _South Bend Tribune_ agrees with Mel that affordable health care is the most important issue in this race. The editorial says Mel "hit the right notes on health care" and "brings strong credentials to the issue."

They also criticized our opponent for ducking town halls and avoiding constituents.

We couldn't have said better why Mel is the right choice for this district. Now, we need all your friends and neighbors to hear this message too.

Thanks for getting the word out,

Team Mel

Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
---
Mel Hall for Congress
P.O. Box 862
South Bend, IN 46624 United States

subject: Wednesday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCaskill for Missouri
body:
Will I see you Wednesday, Friend?
I'm coming to Kansas City because I want to talk about the issues that matter most to you and your family.
We still have a long way to go to expand access to quality, affordable healthcare, defend workers' rights, and end dark money in politics. And instead of fighting for his fellow Missourians, Josh Hawley only responds to the special interests funding his campaign.
Unlike my opponent, I'm fighting for _you, Friend._ **Will you join me at 3600 Broadway Blvd., Kansas City, MO 64111 on Wednesday at 3:00 PM so we can fight for Missouri together?[Click here to RSVP.](http://wfc2.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=eXuFGTc3PYgV9WgFlP5FHmvohNtnGlUb&url=https%3A%2F%2Faction.clairemccaskill.com%2Fp%2Fdia%2Faction4%2Fcommon%2Fpublic%2F%3Faction_KEY%3D10869)**

body:

Peter, dark money groups are spending at historic levels to prop up Congresswoman Blackburn’s campaign and tear down Phil Bredesen with false attacks.
**In fact, more than 70% of the dark money spending for Blackburn has gone toward negative ads against Governor Bredesen -- several of which have already earned “False” and “Mostly False” ratings from the non-partisan group Politifact.**
We can’t let the the Washington Swamp and out-of-state billionaires like the Koch brothers define the final days of this race with lies and misinformation.
**We have to set the record straight — that’s why we’re asking: can you chip in $10 or more to help us set the record straight for voters?**

name: Bob Hugin for Senate
subject: WSJ: Democrats Smiling at Menendez's Corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
| |
---
Democrats have failed all year to find a cogent midterm campaign theme, but one appears to be attaching to them all the same: Listen to what we say; ignore what we do.
Nowhere is this truer than in blue, blue New Jersey, where Sen. Bob Menendez is suddenly struggling.
Recent public polls have awarded Mr. Menendez a 6- or 7-point lead, though a new internal Hugin poll claims the gap is now less than 2.
Democrats are alarmed enough that the Senate Majority PAC this week decided to reroute a precious $3 million to bolster Mr. Menendez with television advertising. The decision is extraordinary, given the number of Senate seats Democrats are already struggling to defend, many in states President Trump carried. But it is even more extraordinary for the statement—campaign theme, if you will—Democrats are rolling out with this ad buy. Namely, don’t believe us.
This is the party that claims to be running against a Republican “culture of corruption.” Democrats have highlighted the conviction of Trump campaign manager Paul Manafort and introduced anticorruption bills in Congress. House Minority Leader Nancy Pelosi in August even provided her members a “toolkit” for talking about supposed GOP misdeeds. They present the Trump White House as some mix of the yakuza and a drug cartel.
Yet here Democrats are intervening on behalf of the one federal lawmaker to have been definitively judged by his peers as corrupt in recent years—to have abused his office, to have scorned ethics rules, to have brought “discredit” on the Senate. A bipartisan letter from the Senate Ethics Committee in April “severely admonished” Mr. Menendez, finding that for six years he had “knowingly and repeatedly accepted gifts of significant value” from his close friend and Democratic Party donor, Florida ophthalmologist Salomon Melgen. The gifts included luxury private-plane flights, soirees in Paris hotels, and free accommodation at a Dominican Republican villa—where Mr. Menendez stayed not once or twice but 19 times.
Some people might call this a quid pro quo, and federal prosecutors did, obtaining an indictment against Mr. Menendez in 2015. The charges were dropped after the Supreme Court tightened the standards on proving such cases. Dr. Melgen, however, was convicted last year of Medicare fraud and has been sentenced to 17 years in federal prison.
One last poignant detail to add to this Democratic theme of anti-anticorruption: The 2015 Menendez indictment noted that in 2012 a fundraiser for a powerful Democratic political outfit accepted two $300,000 contributions from Dr. Melgen’s company, and then earmarked them for Mr. Menendez’s re-election that year. The political outfit? The Senate Majority PAC, the group spending millions to now rescue Mr. Menendez.
Political spending aside, Mr. Menendez’s Democratic colleagues have also shown they are more than happy to tolerate corruption in their own ranks—at least if it means one more Senate seat. After the feds dropped charges, Democrats allowed Mr. Menendez to regain his position as ranking member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee. They permitted him to keep that job even after the Ethics Committee issued its four-page letter admonishing Mr. Menendez.
Following the federal indictment, Minority Leader Chuck Schumer lauded Mr. Menendez as “one of the best legislators in the Senate.” Fellow New Jerseyite Sen. Cory Booker offered his unabashed support even after the Senate admonishment. The Garden State’s Democratic establishment squeezed out the only declared primary challenger to Mr. Menendez, Michael Starr Hopkins, who failed to raise any real money from any Democratic power brokers. Those scions instead all endorsed Mr. Menendez for re-election.
Mr. Menendez strenuously denies that. It is nonetheless remarkable to watch Democrats and their media allies close ranks to insist there is a soaring standard of proof for such serious claims. This in light of their uncorroborated claims against Justice Brett Kavanaugh, as well as Mr. Mendendez’s own moralizing complaints that we live in a world in which a woman can “speak truth to power about a sexual assault,” but “they will not believe you.”

And with that, we are back again to Democrats’ 2018 theme. You can listen to what they say. Or you can believe your own nonlying eyes.

clean_body: | | Democrats have failed all year to find a cogent midterm campaign theme, but one appears to be attaching to them all the same: Listen to what we say; ignore what we do. Nowhere is this truer than in blue, blue New Jersey, where Sen. Bob Menendez is suddenly struggling. Recent public polls have awarded Mr. Menendez a 6- or 7-point lead, though a new internal Hugin poll claims the gap is now less than 2. Democrats are alarmed enough that the Senate Majority PAC this week decided to reroute a precious $3 million to bolster Mr. Menendez with television advertising. The decision is extraordinary, given the number of Senate seats Democrats are already struggling to defend, many in states President Trump carried. But it is even more extraordinary for the statement—campaign theme, if you will—Democrats are rolling out with this ad buy. Namely, don’t believe us. This is the party that claims to be running against a Republican “culture of corruption.” Democrats have highlighted the conviction of Trump campaign manager Paul Manafort and introduced anticorruption bills in Congress. House Minority Leader Nancy Pelosi in August even provided her members a “toolkit” for talking about supposed GOP misdeeds. They present the Trump White House as some mix of the yakuza and a drug cartel. Yet here Democrats are intervening on behalf of the one federal lawmaker to have been definitively judged by his peers as corrupt in recent years—to have abused his office, to have scorned ethics rules, to have brought “discredit” on the Senate. A bipartisan letter from the Senate Ethics Committee in April “severely admonished” Mr. Menendez, finding that for six years he had “knowingly and repeatedly accepted gifts of significant value” from his close friend and Democratic Party donor, Florida ophthalmologist Salomon Melgen. The gifts included luxury private-plane flights, soirees in Paris hotels, and free accommodation at a Dominican Republican villa—where Mr. Menendez stayed not once or twice but 19 times. Some people might call this a quid pro quo, and federal prosecutors did, obtaining an indictment against Mr. Menendez in 2015. The charges were dropped after the Supreme Court tightened the standards on proving such cases. Dr. Melgen, however, was convicted last year of Medicare fraud and has been sentenced to 17 years in federal prison. One last poignant detail to add to this Democratic theme of anti-anticorruption: The 2015 Menendez indictment noted that in 2012 a fundraiser for a powerful Democratic political outfit accepted two $300,000 contributions from Dr. Melgen’s company, and then earmarked them for Mr. Menendez’s re-election that year. The political outfit? The Senate Majority PAC, the group spending millions to now rescue Mr. Menendez. Political spending aside, Mr. Menendez’s Democratic colleagues have also shown they are more than happy to tolerate corruption in their own ranks—at least if it means one more Senate seat. After the feds dropped charges, Democrats allowed Mr. Menendez to regain his position as ranking member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee. They permitted him to keep that job even after the Ethics Committee issued its four-page letter admonishing Mr. Menendez. Following the federal indictment, Minority Leader Chuck Schumer lauded Mr. Menendez as “one of the best legislators in the Senate.” Fellow New Jerseyite Sen. Cory Booker offered his unabashed support even after the Senate admonishment. The Garden State’s Democratic establishment squeezed out the only declared primary challenger to Mr. Menendez, Michael Starr Hopkins, who failed to raise any real money from any Democratic power brokers. Those scions instead all endorsed Mr. Menendez for re-election. Mr. Menendez strenuously denies that. It is nonetheless remarkable to watch Democrats and their media allies close ranks to insist there is a soaring standard of proof for such serious claims. This in light of their uncorroborated claims against Justice Brett Kavanaugh, as well as Mr. Mendendez’s own moralizing complaints that we live in a world in which a woman can “speak truth to power about a sexual assault,” but “they will not believe you.” And with that, we are back again to Democrats’ 2018 theme. You can listen to what they say. Or you can believe your own nonlying eyes. | | | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Web Site" "Instagram" | | | Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc. | | PO BOX 8656, Somerville, NJ 08876 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Barbara Mikulski
subject: A unique story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
This is why we fight for better.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3794cf/7ab0e2c4/7e6d6d80/34985d6a/1013448101/VEsH/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/fight-for-a-better-md-bam?source=OHQ10228A") Friend, Ben and I have something in common -- we were told we don't "look the part." When I joined the Senate, I had to fight for rights as simple as wearing pants on the Senate floor. I may be 4'11", but I stood tall for the people of Maryland for 20 years. Now, Ben has the opportunity to become the first black governor of our state (and at 6'4'' he has a bit of a height advantage, too) -- he can bring forward an important, but often left out, voice for our state, just like I did to the Senate. Ben and I also have _**someone**_ in common -- his grandmother. Mamie Todd (who will be 102 in November!) helped train me in social work years ago, just like she trained Ben in the power of community organizing. She taught us both an important lesson: If you invest more on the front end, you pay less on the back end. For example -- if you invest more in education, you pay less in incarceration. Schools always cost less than prisons. But under Larry Hogan, we've seen our education budget get tighter and tighter, while our budget for prisons continues to balloon. Maryland is falling behind because we're just not investing where it counts. [**We know how this story ends, and it's time to end it. Add your name if you're ready to fight for a better Maryland with Ben Jealous as our next governor.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3794cf/7ab0e2c4/7e6d6d80/34985d6a/1013448101/VEsE/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/fight-for-a-better-md-bam?source=OHQ10228A") | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3794cf/7ab0e2c4/7e6d6d80/34985d6a/1013448101/VEsF/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/fight-for-a-better-md-bam?source=OHQ10228A")
---
Ben's grandmother Mamie is also proof of just how much can change so quickly when folks fight for good.
Mamie's grandfather -- Ben's great-great-grandfather -- was born a slave. He walked out of slavery to become a Virginia state senator, and he co-founded Virginia State University.
Mamie's lived long enough -- 102 years! -- to hear those stories from her grandfather, and also to watch her own grandson become the first black governor of Maryland.
Time can't stand still -- Maryland families deserve better than what they've been given under Larry Hogan. Ben's story is a unique one, one that can only happen in America. But we need more stories like his.
[**I'm ready to fight for better, and I hope you're with me: Add your name next to mine if you're ready for a better, stronger, and cleaner Maryland with Ben Jealous as our next governor.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3794cf/7ab0e2c4/7e6d6d80/34985d6a/1013448101/VEsC/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/fight-for-a-better-md-bam?source=OHQ10228A")
Thanks,
Barbara Mikulski
Former U.S. Senator from Maryland

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3794cf/7ab0e2c4/7e6d6d80/34985d55/1013448101/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ10228Ab")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3794cf/7ab0e2c4/7e6d6d80/34985d54/1013448101/VEsA/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3794cf/7ab0e2c4/7e6d6d80/34985d57/1013448101/VEsB/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3794cf/7ab0e2c4/7e6d6d80/34985d56/1013448101/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3794cf/7ab0e2c4/7e6d6d80/34985d51/1013448101/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

_Can’t make it to the polls on November 6?_

If you qualify, you can still make your voice heard by voting absentee by mail.

**[Find all of your absentee voting information here>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5f6655c3070d48bc859af3b73ff1e2da&_e=_9zr2CAqbxz1j75L4aQQMPXlX2K2rLFhYwm3LKCfwt0aCOG-9UrShhqyIkcUN9CDu91g_bSkp-QS1BAuTO_hQ7Da32RgXD6Khyh19AEK5KZnVBg7dLg3K2_o_DIQEuGlQe0Hu9Cmx7EGyMTLGC1kl9hmuyPPKutAMrCezgweDeMewO8nu5ADQHSrr4sWqMyWgScQtblBlDsjkJEl0uC0uFqCbv5AorDTvKVlcu4sd85SYNKl8e0b3CKQKr3Ovd8ohKz_YdugBcaXEONlZF98J1Z17q7EQeBu9zanQCkq1G2gdagbwIVsPQIBcqkOaQKMp5o263l2LJm2CZylod10HX25jGK-17LMqj4FPo0wJnU%3D)**

body:
Just today, the Mike Braun campaign released a BRAND NEW internal poll, and you're definitely going to want to see this big news...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/internal-memo-braun-surges-ahead-in-poll?e=1acd9bb3d6)
NEW INTERNAL POLL RELEASED!
Mike Braun Surges Ahead of Democrat Joe Donnelly!
https://gallery.mailchimp.com/89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27/files/8e213262-1d66-4128-a783-e6b514b71c46/Braun_State_of_the_Race.pdf?mc_cid=091128874c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Just today, the Mike Braun campaign released a BRAND NEW internal poll (https://gallery.mailchimp.com/89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27/files/8e213262-1d66-4128-a783-e6b514b71c46/Braun_State_of_the_Race.pdf?mc_cid=091128874c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and you're definitely going to want to see this big news...

Three recent internal polls conducted by Mike Braun’s campaign show that momentum is on our side. In fact, Mike Braun is surging just as voters fully tune into the top-targeted U.S. Senate race in the nation!

>>> READ THE POLL HERE! >>> (https://gallery.mailchimp.com/89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27/files/8e213262-1d66-4128-a783-e6b514b71c46/Braun_State_of_the_Race.pdf?mc_cid=091128874c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Beyond the head-to-head numbers, though, is the stunning fact that Democrat Joe Donnelly’s favorability ratings – an important indicator of voter sentiment and trust – are collapsing, too.

The mainstream media’s cooked polls (in which one claimed there were an almost equal number of Republicans and Democrats in Indiana!!) aren’t telling the full story. We encourage you to share with your fellow Republicans, friends and family this memo (https://gallery.mailchimp.com/89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27/files/8e213262-1d66-4128-a783-e6b514b71c46/Braun_State_of_the_Race.pdf?mc_cid=091128874c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) so they can see firsthand where the race truly stands.

It’s a fight to the finish line, no doubt, but it’s a fight we are poised to WIN as long as we keep up the energy and enthusiasm we’ve been feeling on the road during our Right Track Results Tour.
Read the Internal Poll NOW! (https://gallery.mailchimp.com/89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27/files/8e213262-1d66-4128-a783-e6b514b71c46/Braun_State_of_the_Race.pdf?mc_cid=091128874c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: showdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Tomorrow night, Stacey will face off against Brian Kemp in a public debate. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa700/34a064cc/14b3dc4/70d6ef3/3540299049/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, Tomorrow night, Stacey will face off against Brian Kemp in their first public debate of this election. Stacey is going to get up onstage and talk about her plans to build a Georgia where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to thrive, where we invest in every child from cradle to career, and where we ensure good-paying jobs in every single one of Georgia's 159 counties. Meanwhile, Brian Kemp is going to lob attack after attack at Stacey and try and distract from the fact that he doesn't have a single concrete plan to move Georgia forward. Tomorrow's debate is our chance to prove that Georgia families support Stacey's progressive agenda, that Georgians want a Governor who will work for them and not for special interests. Stacey's vision for Georgia is within our grasp, but it's going to take all of us working together to make it a reality. That's why we ask: **[Make a $3 donation before tomorrow night's debate to show that you not only support Stacey Abrams' progressive agenda, but are ready to step up and fight for Stacey today and every day from now until Election Day.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa700/34a064cc/14b3dc4/70d6ef0/3540299049/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDIyMjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10222018-full")** Thank you for all you've done to support our campaign. We've got 15 days left to win this election, and I know I can count on you to see it through. \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager

body:
Our latest television advertisement stars three very special members of Team Spanberger -- my daughters! The ad is titled "Superhero," but on the campaign, and in my house, we've taken to calling it "Pow-Pow."
| | Peter, Our campaign debuted [**our latest television advertisement**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6yV6FIAvaHHk7QBU4heFxqmKIiw2ndfnzEJgJ8E3TmA=/sl6WbD4t5JvibPS24TMg03MQlju4I8ph8ltNGnBa3-k=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) today, **and it stars three very special members of Team Spanberger --_my daughters!_** The ad is titled "Superhero," but on the campaign, and in my house, we've taken to calling it "Pow-Pow." [**And, well, I won 't spoil it -- _you will see why when you watch:_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6yV6FIAvaHHk7QBU4heFxqmKIiw2ndfnzEJgJ8E3TmA=/sl6WbD4t5JvibPS24TMg03MQlju4I8ph8ltNGnBa3-k=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6yV6FIAvaHHk7QBU4heFxqmKIiw2ndfnzEJgJ8E3TmA=/sl6WbD4t5JvibPS24TMg03MQlju4I8ph8ltNGnBa3-k=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Filming this ad was a rewarding, and very fun, experience for my family, Peter. I decided to run for Congress in large part because of my daughters, who I believe deserve a government that will chart a brighter future for them and their generation. I'm sure mothers and fathers across VA-7 will relate to that feeling. [**Peter, do take a moment to watch, and then please make a grassroots donation to help me keep it running across the district.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6yV6FIAvaHHk7QBU4heFxqmKIiw2ndfnzEJgJ8E3TmA=/sl6WbD4t5JvibPS24TMg03MQlju4I8ph8ltNGnBa3-k=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) I'm biased, but you won't regret it. Thanks, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6yV6FIAvaHHk7QBU4heFxqmKIiw2ndfnzEJgJ8E3TmA=/sl6WbD4t5JvibPS24TMg03MQlju4I8ph8ltNGnBa3-k=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6yV6FIAvaHHk7QBU4heFxqmKIiw2ndfnzEJgJ8E3TmA=/olEJyuhaN1ERKHXLU2nPYUz_ZD3T-cPwDbzJWNMJxlY=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/6yV6FIAvaHHk7QBU4heFxqmKIiw2ndfnzEJgJ8E3TmA=/b4mrsgRxDQCgCTzxPdJVTtiMAGnN-ECWQ3T4fCRaHNc=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

body:

Hi friends - I'm about to head on stage for my first debate with Chris Sununu, but I wanted to make sure to touch base with you. **With just 15 days to go before Nov. 6, we can't let our campaign lose momentum.**
Chris Sununu and his big-dollar right-wing corporate donors are flooding this race with attack ads to defeat me, so I'm counting on grassroots donors to raise the final $2,351 we need to hit our fundraising goal.
**[Can I count on you to donate $5- or whatever you can right now - to take back the corner office and flip NH blue in November?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a5b/d0ce7de/50f076a0/9cdb77d/3166204982/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjEzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk213-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") **
I'm so grateful for your support. Wish me luck out there!

Molly

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: three challengers want me gone
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | This campaign has brought up unique challenges. Three challengers "hope to unseat" me. Republicans "set their sights" on kicking me out of office early on. You know by now, none of that makes a difference to me. I'm no stranger to Republican attacks. I still call them out for their hypocrisy. I've fought my entire career for Florida families, on the campaign trail and in Congress. Because of you and so many others, we can take whatever Republicans throw at us. Early voting starts today -- **and we need a $22,000 grassroots boost.** [**Can you give $5 or more to help us reach that goal?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c89/622b7b5b/1d775698/307b67d8/1313915784/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181022?refcode=dwse181022_m&recurring=true&amount=5") It's not the campaign challenges that concern me most -- it's the challenges Florida families face, and the idea that those challenges will get worse if Republicans hold the House. We know they plan to go after Medicare and Social Security. We know they'll come after the Affordable Care Act again. Seniors. Women. Middle class families. People with pre-existing conditions. Those groups include hundreds of millions of Americans -- and those are only some of the people who will be affected if Republicans have a successful Election Day. **It's my job to fight for you, and I will do it for as long as I can.** I need you by my side. [**Help us raise this $22,000 boost as early voting begins. Give what you can.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c89/622b7b5b/1d775698/307b67d8/1313915784/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181022?refcode=dwse181022_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you for standing with me. Debbie
---

|
---

name: Mara Boggs
subject: Joe earns WV newspaper endorsements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Dear fellow West Virginian,

Joe Manchin swept the first wave of newspaper endorsements in West Virginia. Local newspapers from Huntington to North Central West Virginia to the Northern Panhandle to the Eastern Panhandle agree that Joe Manchin is the best choice for the Mountain State.

Each endorsement praised Manchin for his work on local issues and always putting West Virginia first. Many of the editorial boards raised concerns over Morrisey's lawsuit to deny coverage for people with pre-existing conditions and his work as a lobbyist for the opioid industry.

Endorsement Highlights

[Huntington Herald-Dispatch: Editorial: Manchin has proven his focus is on West Virginians](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKWI%2bFalA%2fGfWAiZr3m4LPUocTWjuCafnBxrjQ3LE5kXHWYnTDsPiunkqWNsQFveY0iCuOrqdOllo05m3%2feHhX08H%2bx8onHMhcjSM5c9y19M5NlNC9M9N7QE2BV7CYktsWnFPBQ4HNxtKPsNl24xmIJUVVDYuMWK96yD%2f7ZOrrqTMaGJ6BrTANA5KTm4y5MwHQWJaV639wjj1Lgsq8mim2JAUI6%2bC3HWvq7MUSiXKujINyLgwVd9l6tYWYGjH1%2fkNFw%3d%3d)

Manchin also fought to have health benefits for retired miners protected, and he continues to seek a way to preserve coal miners' pensions after their employers went bankrupt and sought to eliminate them. He also has advocated for continued efforts to combat black lung disease, for the coal industry as a whole, and to provide training for out-of-work miners.
...

Although Morrisey wants to "blow up" Washington, according to one of his campaign ads, folks should remember that for several years he was part of the Washington scene as a lobbyist. Among those he was paid to advocate for were the big pharmaceutical companies - some of the same companies who shipped millions of pills to West Virginia and contributed to the opioid epidemic that hit the state over the last decade or more.

[Wheeling Intelligencer: The Sunday News-Register Endorses Joe Manchin for U.S. Senate](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKcvCUINtMjzHCn%2bJPNmqtH9Sn9cl6AEOI%2fcGj0M0%2bu7ZzsLKM5VX0pUNMudR1PYfhzdHKnyHVBJ3%2bocdqn2jyPmek7Tl5EcPH%2bg6EyKomPbetiKtDgHFfduLtH8rSXy7bIBS%2brA1l8qtgFr93A6y0q3jM8PV9HVpO1cmcxSytJESI%2b0rjxIV1a7bCdTSwfrWp3ZSQFELI%2b15G4Wz6OK3apjBxHwJmgmKNA%3d%3d)

For nearly eight years, he has served Mountain State residents well, taking his orders from us rather than anyone in Washington.
...
Manchin's seniority and ability to build coalitions among moderate Democrats and Republicans are the kind of leadership we need in the Senate. Manchin represents his fellow Mountain State residents -- regardless of what anyone, Democrat or Republican, in Washington demands.

[Clarksburg Exponent Telegram: Editorial: Manchin voice of reason in partisan-laden D.C.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON14Dvkkrs9VaHWlLkko8kgi0IpFlL0SbRPLUYncnBLUwMJWzm1VkG8O3%2fL8yKKgvZEa%2fKOeOZvLi8vfyQ5LwWlEI7ompZwV2MMKi1rHd%2fRnPW1XrlbB7TtqupBuZ219RHbyXDIFfkfo92keQE7s460jOzFygYwDfbujsG0iA4Fu%2boLGXGPU4hEKts3ZtTnagZswVZjfizEVD%2fssNMimfGIkg6vkXHf2Eqa2sMl2hfDJgfXUm23Nh8nzA%3d%3d)

He has demonstrated in his years of public service the ability to bring differing sides to the table and to broker solutions to trying situations. His willingness to cross party lines has been consistent throughout his days, first as West Virginia's secretary of state, then governor and now as its senior senator.
...

We're also troubled by Morrisey's past relationship with major drugmakers as a lobbyist. Some of those firms were those that profited greatly at West Virginians' expense during the ongoing prescription pill addiction epidemic.

And Morrisey's lack of regard for transparency in government remains troubling, both in his service as the state's attorney general and a potential U.S. senator.
Morrisey has refused to provide information requested by various media and members of the public through the Freedom of Information Act.

[Martinsburg Journal: Why Manchin deserves our vote on Nov. 6](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKZo1VYdO2d8nAngJqW%2bijOBjAzOsYdHO9opNE0OE9FL5ME7tJTlSIIJ2%2fky6RBjnYvIEdwu%2bjuXaDPvM2ImOD9XzsA7Q5Q%2bnD1D2jRFi%2fLb7T2KuWwYa7q%2fO5%2f5mjG189Go2xThkpHOBIVtuRWat%2bv%2bfDWvzBmTJghA%2fmSjzI5H2lL33gyXsJ1%2fXrhVpf%2bnpxg%3d%3d)
When we face emergencies, Manchin has been there to help. After it was reported Martinsburg's water system had been contaminated by chemicals in the PFOA family, the senator went into action. He secured $20 million to clean up the chemical here and in other affected areas of West Virginia. Another $10 million was made available to study the health effects of that chemical.

Economic development has been a priority, with Manchin securing funds to promote it through projects such as expansion of broadband service to the Fort Ashby Business Park in Mineral County and improvements to the regional airport in Martinsburg.

[Parkersburg News and Sentinel: West Virginia Senator deserves another term](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKWOH2ky7M3GbVo2j6BZRgmCJkss2xcMGZQtvUonaZg3QAJGV6G5iNdh6GIuviVQqgKGAhbovtXXamoS4I8zbesVJS%2fGN6SJBTFH1m992Uw4XZPCps90J%2bgGqaFGISZZKCDMsXNXUn2EBlDIhXQw2KzMIHXbeaFhdMFV2A4pcwZPxqCQ19sWqemwn%2b7Dw4bYkglW82zWjGGM3j4CjVRZ%2fgyw%3d)

Mid-Ohio Valley residents have many reasons to be grateful Manchin keeps his finger on the pulse of our area.

Just last spring, he understood the urgency of protecting West Virginians, including those in the Mid-Ohio Valley, whose water systems were affected by unacceptably high levels of polyfluoroalkyl chemicals. He enlisted the Environmental Protection Agency, the Pentagon, even the Office of Management and Budget to deal with the concern.

As a member of the Senate Appropriations Committee, Manchin has the clout needed to steer federal dollars to our region. This year alone he has helped to direct nearly $43 million to our region, including Wood, Pleasants, Jackson, Wirt and Tyler counties.

The Dominion Post: It's McKinley and Manchin.

[Manchin's] knowledge of energy policy and a reputation for bipartisanship give him the tools to accomplish much on behalf of West Virginia.

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
---

P.O. Box 5202
Charleston, WV 25361
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC457kkjv9LkTjvDXRuLbXMKT3SLPHL8f66seeqvDN0HKv0yZtvicTJBHji0Rx3fpXm%2fh2PIGbpA56ZmM8ZFXvbp1NGeD8qcDsppJfQufYNAiO%2f3aS9exDIfnuBCexhiMrOABollAbTBB7py3dqZVEJYBGPtGKDO4qGoKid%2f27o3S2%2bt9fGbsJDkgspp8OyTAgGgamZFm%2brNQgXIDcyw22V%2fpLMSxhzKQI84%2fQIXcvFUEgMsedON8O6Co%3d)

clean_body: Dear fellow West Virginian, Joe Manchin swept the first wave of newspaper endorsements in West Virginia. Local newspapers from Huntington to North Central West Virginia to the Northern Panhandle to the Eastern Panhandle agree that Joe Manchin is the best choice for the Mountain State. Each endorsement praised Manchin for his work on local issues and always putting West Virginia first. Many of the editorial boards raised concerns over Morrisey's lawsuit to deny coverage for people with pre-existing conditions and his work as a lobbyist for the opioid industry. Endorsement Highlights Manchin also fought to have health benefits for retired miners protected, and he continues to seek a way to preserve coal miners' pensions after their employers went bankrupt and sought to eliminate them. He also has advocated for continued efforts to combat black lung disease, for the coal industry as a whole, and to provide training for out-of-work miners. ... Although Morrisey wants to "blow up" Washington, according to one of his campaign ads, folks should remember that for several years he was part of the Washington scene as a lobbyist. Among those he was paid to advocate for were the big pharmaceutical companies - some of the same companies who shipped millions of pills to West Virginia and contributed to the opioid epidemic that hit the state over the last decade or more. For nearly eight years, he has served Mountain State residents well, taking his orders from us rather than anyone in Washington. ... Manchin's seniority and ability to build coalitions among moderate Democrats and Republicans are the kind of leadership we need in the Senate. clean_body: “Democrats will need a near-perfect November to win back control of the chamber” \-- Vox | Peter, The Senate race in Indiana is looking far from perfect for Democrats. The extreme Republican opponent is a self-funder who’s given himself millions. The experts are calling this race one of “the most important" in the country -- If he does, Democrats could take control of the Senate. And we can HOLD DONALD TRUMP ACCOUNTABLE! But if Joe loses, Republicans will stay in charge. And Trump will continue to implement his extreme agenda. It’s THAT simple. This race is still totally up in the air. Indy Politics calls it a “statistical tie.” That means YOUR donation could be the one that wins it... and makes Mitch McConnell the Minority Leader. Joe voted AGAINST Brett Kavanaugh. He voted AGAINST the GOP tax scam. And he voted FOR the Affordable Care Act. Peter, WE’RE DEPENDING ON YOU TO TURN THIS TIED RACE INTO A DEMOCRATIC WIN. Chip in to make sure Joe’s where he belongs -- in a Democratic-majority Senate. subject: Big wins in the Lone Star State!
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 22, 2018
# Big wins in the Lone Star State!
**This evening** , President Donald J. Trump is in Houston, where hardworking Texans know he is delivering results for working people across the state. **Unemployment in the Lone Star State** has dropped to 3.8 percent—the lowest rate ever recorded. If that weren’t enough, the average Texas family has been able to save more than $2,000 on average thanks to December’s historic Tax Cuts and Jobs Act. [**Something to share: Big wins for Texans under President Trump**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTg2MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU4NjAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0MjY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1054471737436442627) **The recent headlines:** **[President Trump propels an economic resurgence](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTg2MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU4NjAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0MjY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-propels-economic-resurgence/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)** **Catch-and-release loopholes created a border crisis** **The surge of illegal immigration** from Central America, thanks to outdated laws demanding “catch-and-release,” has created a dire crisis at our southern border. **Congressional Democrats helped create loopholes** that make it nearly impossible to remove many illegal immigrants. Outrageous catch-and-release laws and subsequent court rulings have resulted in de facto immunity for illegal alien minors—and the adults from Central America who arrive at the border with them. **How far has the left gone** to embrace open borders and obstruct even the most basic reform of America’s broken immigration system? Democrats in the House opposed the Criminal Alien Gang Member Removal Act, a bill designed to help law enforcement officials keep criminal gang members from residing illegally in our communities. **Another proposal from Democrats?** Simply abolish U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, a move that a [**majority of Americans oppose.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTg2MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU4NjAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0MjY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/politico-voters-oppose-abolishing-ice/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) [**President Trump stands with the heroes who secure our borders.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTg2MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU4NjAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0MjY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-stands-brave-heroes-enforce-immigration-laws-secure-borders/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **More:** [**America’s immigration challenge doesn’t end at our doorstep**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTg2MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU4NjAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0MjY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/californias-sanctuary-laws-arent-pro-immigrant-local-leaders-pushing-back/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**Marine One lifts off from the South Lawn of the White House in flight to Joint Base Andrews** | October 22, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTg2MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU4NjAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0MjY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTg2MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU4NjAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0MjY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIyLjk2NTg2MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMi45NjU4NjAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0MjY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Mark Warner
subject: There's a lot to say but I'll try to keep it short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
15 days from Election Day in Virginia, Derek. Here are some important updates: ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, I'm writing today to ask for your help and I'll try to keep it short:
* We're 15 days away,
* Stewart could be within single digits of Tim Kaine based on some recent polls,
* Tim's team has had to make some budget cuts in the past couple of weeks and this has impacted some of their plans to turn out Virginians on Election Day.

We need to re-elect Tim and we also need to make sure Democratic turnout is high in every single district so all of our great House Democrats have a fighting chance.

**Tim 's team can't afford to miss another goal, so will you rush a donation today to make sure they raise $9,500 more by tonight and can get back on track for October?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10dd/3e0906/777900c6/3e37da23/2424765037/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-stewart-fundraising?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181022_2_FR_MRW_October-Warner-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+5&utm_campaign=20181022_2_FR_MRW_October-Warner-LDND&source=20181022_2_FR_MRW_October-Warner-LDND")

clean_body: 15 days from Election Day in Virginia, Derek. Here are some important updates: ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, I'm writing today to ask for your help and I'll try to keep it short: We're 15 days away, Stewart could be within single digits of Tim Kaine based on some recent polls, Tim's team has had to make some budget cuts in the past couple of weeks and this has impacted some of their plans to turn out Virginians on Election Day. We need to re-elect Tim and we also need to make sure Democratic turnout is high in every single district so all of our great House Democrats have a fighting chance. Tim 's team can't afford to miss another goal, so will you rush a donation today to make sure they raise $9,500 more by tonight and can get back on track for October? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks so much for doing this for Tim, for me, and for Virginians. "" Take care, Sen. Mark Warner | "" "" ""

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Folks on the front lines
body:
| Peter -- From the beginning, we’ve rejected the typical Washington playbook. This race is about Tennessee. That’s why I’ve been hosting town halls, roundtable conversations on main streets and brown-bag lunches in barns, hospitals, and community centers -- talking with voters about the problems they face and what they want to see from their leaders. I know the best way to learn is to talk with folks on the front lines. I’ve got no idea the political views of most of the people at these events -- and I don’t care. I just want to hear directly about their experiences and talk about the best ideas. I’ve been humbled by how our message of bringing people together to get things done is resonating with voters. But here’s the truth -- Congresswoman Blackburn and the Washington establishment would rather make this race about dividing people into tribes to hide the fact that they’re not interested in finding real solutions. **That’s why dark money groups have spent more than $20 million trying to beat me. And it’s why I’m asking for your help. Can you chip in $10 or more so our campaign can keep tuning out the dark money attacks while we get out the vote in this important election?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2781447/17406716/650465896?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjc1MjQ2OS00YmQ2LWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuXryvpbI8IVysn5gRALSt8hzfuTxw84n5tO20yERxU=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181022-front-lines-express&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)******

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: concerned about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I'm worried about Senator Claire McCaskill's re-election, everyone. A poll released just a few days ago shows that if the election were held today, she'd lose by one point.
It's no wonder -- Mitch McConnell and GOP corporate special interests have spent $20 million to defeat Claire, and they've made this a really tough race.
But Claire isn't relying on the likes of McConnell, Trump, and the Kochs to bankroll her campaign -- she's depending on you.
With just 15 days until the election, Claire really needs you to come through. [**Will you please rush $3 or as much as you can to her campaign right now?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1ff/2a380d31/3686e43a/f1688f/1844731726/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMjJfTVdINENNQzFfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181022_MWH4CMC1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
If Claire's opponent, Josh Hawley, wins, the GOP will pick up a rubberstamp for Trump's agenda. He's even quoted as saying that he disagrees with Trump on "nothing that has happened so far." Nothing.
Republicans are throwing the kitchen sink at Missouri because they know that whichever party wins here will likely win control of the Senate. The truth is, they're probably right. That's why it's so important that we have Claire's back.
You helped me win by just 1,017 votes in 2016, so now I need you to please show Claire that same support. Here's the link to give directly to her campaign:
[**https://hassan.bsd.net/Protect-Claire-McCaskill**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1ff/2a380d31/3686e43a/f1688f/1844731726/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMjJfTVdINENNQzFfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181022_MWH4CMC1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1ff/2a380d31/3686e43a/f1688f/1844731726/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMjJfTVdINENNQzFfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181022_MWH4CMC1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Step Up: Don't Use Military Bases to Export Coal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
It's time to take action.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bb43/2f5ea88d/745897cf/2cbd99a1/2583414797/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-coal-export?utm_source=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&refcode=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&utm_campaign=coal-export&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Trump's latest scheme is as ill-conceived as it is reckless. In response to our strong environmental protection laws in states like California, Oregon, and, of course, Washington, Trump is once again threatening our climate and security. He says if we won't take his coal, he'll export it -- out of our West Coast military bases. There are so many things wrong with this harebrained proposal: First, it flat-out undermines our national security. Those who serve at our military bases are meant to keep our country safe, not provide private export services for big coal and oil companies. Second, it threatens states' rights to keep our air and water clean. But unfortunately, this is just another in a long line of attempts by Trump's climate-denying administration to ignore and subvert state clean air and water laws. They will fail -- and they must fail. [**So let's make sure they do -- chip in $5 now to help fund our fight for climate leadership in this country:**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bb43/2f5ea88d/745897cf/2cbd99a1/2583414797/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-coal-export?utm_source=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&refcode=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&utm_campaign=coal-export&utm_medium=ema") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bb43/2f5ea88d/745897cf/2cbd99a0/2583414797/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-coal-export?utm_source=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&refcode=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&utm_campaign=coal-export&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=10")
