---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bb43/2f5ea88d/745897cf/2cbd99a5/2583414797/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-coal-export?utm_source=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&refcode=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&utm_campaign=coal-export&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bb43/2f5ea88d/745897cf/2cbd99a1/2583414797/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-coal-export?utm_source=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&refcode=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&utm_campaign=coal-export&utm_medium=ema")**
We're not backing down here in Washington. Climate change is a serious threat to our very existence, and Washington state maintains the authority to enforce our own laws protecting our air, our land, and our future. It's our right.
Look -- this isn't the time for another petulant display of ego from Donald Trump. We here on the West Coast, and all across America, are already seeing the terrible impact of climate change on our health, our economy, our property, and our lives.
It's time to start confronting climate change -- before it's too late.
[**In response to Trump's absurd proposal, show him you won't back down. Chip in to fund our fight for a clean energy revolution, and a climate change movement, right now.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bb43/2f5ea88d/745897cf/2cbd99a1/2583414797/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-coal-export?utm_source=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&refcode=ema_2018-10-22_coal-export&utm_campaign=coal-export&utm_medium=ema")
Climate change demands our attention, our passion, and our action. Our children and grandchildren are counting on us.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

clean_body: It's time to take action. | "" Friend, Trump's latest scheme is as ill-conceived as it is reckless. In response to our strong environmental protection laws in states like California, Oregon, and, of course, Washington, Trump is once again threatening our climate and security. He says if we won't take his coal, he'll export it -- out of our West Coast military bases. There are so many things wrong with this harebrained proposal: First, it flat-out undermines our national security. Those who serve at our military bases are meant to keep our country safe, not provide private export services for big coal and oil companies. Second, it threatens states' rights to keep our air and water clean. But unfortunately, this is just another in a long line of attempts by Trump's climate-denying administration to ignore and subvert state clean air and water laws. They will fail -- and they must fail. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" ---|--- | | "" ---|--- | | "" ---|--- | | "" ---|--- "" We're not backing down here in Washington. Climate change is a serious threat to our very existence, and Washington state maintains the authority to enforce our own laws protecting our air, our land, and our future. It's our right. Look -- this isn't the time for another petulant display of ego from Donald Trump. We here on the West Coast, and all across America, are already seeing the terrible impact of climate change on our health, our economy, our property, and our lives. It's time to start confronting climate change -- before it's too late. "" Climate change demands our attention, our passion, and our action. Our children and grandchildren are counting on us. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee "" Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country. | ""

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben=20Carollo=20via=20Ian=20Todd=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Here are the links to this weekend's debates..
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
** Debate links are live!
------------------------------------------------------------
As promised here are the links to the debates so you can listen/watch online at your convenience. I will make one quick observation though. You may notice that Tom Emmer has nearly line for line, the same thing to say in each debate.

He has well-rehearsed lines that claim our economy is wonderful and that our healthcare system is fine. No matter how well memorized those lines may be, they are certainly not true. People are struggling to afford their healthcare, and Tom Emmer is clearly out of touch with the needs of our district.

body:

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: J.D. Scholten and Deidre DeJear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to do something very important. I am going to ask you to help defeat Congressman Steve King by making a contribution to progressive candidate J.D. Scholten’s campaign, and to split it with a contribution to Deidre DeJear’s campaign for Secretary of State.
Here’s why this request is so important:
Congressman Steve King, you may know, is the leading anti-immigrant xenophobe in Washington, D.C. He is so outrageous that he recently endorsed a white nationalist candidate running for office.
But this is the year we defeat him. The polls show this is a very close race. And after spending much of the weekend attending large and enthusiastic rallies in Iowa with his progressive challenger, J.D. Scholten, I believe it will be us, the political revolution, that finally gets the job done.
I also spent a lot of time this weekend with Deidre DeJear, who is running for Secretary of State and will be a leading voice against Republican voter suppression efforts in Iowa and nationally. Deidre would be the first African American elected to statewide office in Iowa ever. Let me say that again... the first **_ever_**.
These are both very important races. Both candidates can win, but they need our help. And if you’re with them today, I believe that they will win:
**[Can you split a very important $3 donation between J.D. Scholten’s campaign for Congress, Deidre DeJear’s campaign for Secretary of State, and my work traveling the country and rallying progressives to get out the vote ahead of the most important election in a very long time? I would not ask if this was not so important.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6237?refcode=em181022-full&t=25&akid=259%2E150750%2Ew8TP0L)**
The political revolution was never just about our presidential campaign alone. It was about millions of people standing up and saying they want a government that works for all of us, and not just the top 1 percent.
That spirit lives on in Iowa. And it will help get these two great candidates over the top on Election Day.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[DONATE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6237?refcode=em181022-full&t=26&akid=259%2E150750%2Ew8TP0L)
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=259%2E150750%2Ew8TP0L). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&akid=259%2E150750%2Ew8TP0L).

name: Team Menendez
subject: Senator Menendez will be online tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

Want to talk to Democratic Senator Bob Menendez and New Jersey Senator Loretta Weinberg about issues affecting New Jersey women and families? Tonight is your night!

[**Join in on the conversation by joining us for a Facebook Live conversation with Senators Bob Menendez and Loretta Weinberg tonight at 7:30 PM ET.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ce7/3af3c5d/39b56538/4ec3002f/2781782534/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/events/2254259448231884/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=menendez&utm_content=1+-+Join+in+on+the+conversation+by+joining+u&utm_campaign=em18_181022_FBLive_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&source=em18_181022_FBLive_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx") [](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ce7/3af3c5d/39b56538/4ec3002e/2781782534/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/events/2254259448231884/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=menendez&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em18_181022_FBLive_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&source=em18_181022_FBLive_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx")
| [JOIN US ON FACEBOOK](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ce7/3af3c5d/39b56538/4ec30021/2781782534/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/events/2254259448231884/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=menendez&utm_content=3+-+JOIN+US+ON+FACEBOOK&utm_campaign=em18_181022_FBLive_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&source=em18_181022_FBLive_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx")

Bob Hugin has proven beyond a shadow of a doubt that he is not on New Jersey women's side, and now with so much at stake, it's never been more important to rally together and ensure that Hugin isn't allowed to buy this seat.

name: Zack Malitz, betofortexas.com
subject: What Trump doesn’t understand about us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Donald Trump just told a room full of reporters that Beto is “highly
overrated.”

But Trump doesn’t understand that our campaign isn’t just Beto. It’s all
of us. He’s got you and me, and hundreds of thousands of amazing
volunteers and donors, each giving what we can of our time and money to
make this incredible campaign work.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181022&t=1019&akid=20450%2E444211%2EQp6gN- ]Can you donate
$3 right
now to send a message about the size and strength of our grassroots
campaign? Show Trump that it’s not just Beto running -- it’s all of us.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181022&t=1020&akid=20450%2E444211%2EQp6gN- ]Contribute
$3
»

We’ve funded our entire campaign without accepting a dime from special
interests, corporations or PACs. We’ve built the largest grassroots team
in Texas history. And this weekend alone, we knocked on more than 200,000
doors, having real conversations with Texas voters about Beto and our
campaign. Our job this election is to prove that when people of all
backgrounds come together, there’s nothing that can stop us.

This is going to be a close election, probably within just a couple of
percentage points. The way we pull off a win is if we have the resources
we need to get voters to the polls.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181022&t=1021&akid=20450%2E444211%2EQp6gN- ]Make a
$3 contribution
right now as a way of saying you’re with Beto and nobody -- not Donald
Trump nor Ted Cruz -- should underestimate our strength.

This whole campaign is based on one core principle: that if millions of
people come together to give just a little bit, we can overcome any odds
and win. I hope you’ll think about that right now and choose to contribute
what you can in these final days.

It’s an honor to be in this with you,

Zack Malitz
Field Director
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181022&t=1022&akid=20450%2E444211%2EQp6gN- ]Contribute
$3
»

name: Adam Spanberger
subject: FW: “Superhero”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I hope you caught Abby's latest television ad, because it's my favorite of the campaign so far. I hope you caught Abby's latest television ad, because it's my favorite of the campaign so far. As you'll see in the video, our daughters really look up to Abby.
| | Peter, I hope you caught [**Abby 's latest television ad,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/acn6LZUuW1DShKWufuITJ9sxlIeOwfsBzh3Ddory4zQ=/x6VqokVq73xvzfdFAa2cqvYx1yERXfNIR-bzbeu18WI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) because it's my favorite of the campaign so far. As you'll see in the video, our daughters really look up to Abby. She is hardworking, she is loving, and she has taught our daughters that they can accomplish anything if they set their minds to it. She is truly a tremendous role model and a tremendous mom. So while Abby says she's not actually a superhero -- I disagree. _She 's a superhero in my book._ [**If you haven 't had a chance, please do take a minute to watch the ad, and then consider making a donation to the campaign, so we can show voters across the district what a superhero Abby is.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/acn6LZUuW1DShKWufuITJ9sxlIeOwfsBzh3Ddory4zQ=/x6VqokVq73xvzfdFAa2cqvYx1yERXfNIR-bzbeu18WI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Adam \-----forwarded message----- From: Abigail Spanberger Sent: Mon, Oct 22, 4:25 PM Subject: "Superhero" Friends, Our campaign debuted [**our latest television advertisement**](https://act.myngp.com/el/acn6LZUuW1DShKWufuITJ9sxlIeOwfsBzh3Ddory4zQ=/x6VqokVq73xvzfdFAa2cqvYx1yERXfNIR-bzbeu18WI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) today, **and it stars three very special members of Team Spanberger --_my daughters!_** The ad is titled "Superhero," but on the campaign, and in my house, we've taken to calling it "Pow-Pow." [**And, well, I won 't spoil it -- _you will see why when you watch:_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/acn6LZUuW1DShKWufuITJ9sxlIeOwfsBzh3Ddory4zQ=/x6VqokVq73xvzfdFAa2cqvYx1yERXfNIR-bzbeu18WI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/acn6LZUuW1DShKWufuITJ9sxlIeOwfsBzh3Ddory4zQ=/x6VqokVq73xvzfdFAa2cqvYx1yERXfNIR-bzbeu18WI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Filming this ad was a rewarding, and very fun, experience for my family, friends. I decided to run for Congress in large part because of my daughters, who I believe deserve a government that will chart a brighter future for them and their generation. I'm sure mothers and fathers across VA-7 will relate to that feeling. [**Friends, do take a moment to watch, and then please make a grassroots donation to help me keep it running across the district.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/acn6LZUuW1DShKWufuITJ9sxlIeOwfsBzh3Ddory4zQ=/x6VqokVq73xvzfdFAa2cqvYx1yERXfNIR-bzbeu18WI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) I'm biased, but you won't regret it. Thanks, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/acn6LZUuW1DShKWufuITJ9sxlIeOwfsBzh3Ddory4zQ=/x6VqokVq73xvzfdFAa2cqvYx1yERXfNIR-bzbeu18WI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/acn6LZUuW1DShKWufuITJ9sxlIeOwfsBzh3Ddory4zQ=/cBmCkyPqD_vr_yUKeUMqrNxGhsywvcINWu4a496n3UA=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/acn6LZUuW1DShKWufuITJ9sxlIeOwfsBzh3Ddory4zQ=/m_Ja5VXh8xICtrVQtOvuUq30kN54hCcW9sL1YRkSaZU=)_

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I just cast my ballot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Vote early. Then knock on doors. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa706/34a064cc/1566522/70d6a07/556028149/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, Today, I voted early in my community, with my community, and most importantly, _for_ my community. In the past, I always went to vote on Election Day. That's when my parents would take me and my siblings to vote with them when we were little. But early voting this year is critical because we're leaving nothing to chance. We're getting our votes in early so we have time to fix any problems that could arise - and still have plenty of time to knock on doors afterwards to ensure other folks cast their ballot as well. I know you've seen the news about Kemp's voter suppression efforts, and I know you're worried. **Let me be clear: The best way to beat voter suppression is to VOTE.** But we need to work to make the system work for us, and that means casting a ballot early. Every day we wait is a day of democracy delayed. **[So I want to encourage everyone to make a plan to vote early, like I did. Check out my website for information on where to go and what you'll need to bring with you in order to ensure your vote is counted.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa706/34a064cc/1566522/70d6a04/556028149/VEsE/ "https://staceyabrams.com/vote")** And don't just vote for me. Vote for our entire Democratic ticket, because bringing progress to Georgia requires representation at every level of government, from school board, to county commissioner, to Secretary of State. I'm running for Governor because I believe in my core that Georgia has a bright future ahead, a future where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to thrive. And I know we can get there if every single Georgian makes their voice heard before Election Day. So don't wait. _Vote early, then join us in the field to knock on doors._ Let's get it done. Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa706/34a064cc/1566522/70d6a05/556028149/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDIyMjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10222018.2-full")**

clean_body: Vote early. Then knock on doors. | "" | | | Friend, Today, I voted early in my community, with my community, and most importantly, for my community. In the past, I always went to vote on Election Day. That's when my parents would take me and my siblings to vote with them when we were little. But early voting this year is critical because we're leaving nothing to chance. We're getting our votes in early so we have time to fix any problems that could arise - and still have plenty of time to knock on doors afterwards to ensure other folks cast their ballot as well. I know you've seen the news about Kemp's voter suppression efforts, and I know you're worried. Let me be clear: The best way to beat voter suppression is to VOTE. But we need to work to make the system work for us, and that means casting a ballot early. Every day we wait is a day of democracy delayed. "" And don't just vote for me. Vote for our entire Democratic ticket, because bringing progress to Georgia requires representation at every level of government, from school board, to county commissioner, to Secretary of State. I'm running for Governor because I believe in my core that Georgia has a bright future ahead, a future where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to thrive. And I know we can get there if every single Georgian makes their voice heard before Election Day. So don't wait. Vote early, then join us in the field to knock on doors. Let's get it done. Stacey Abrams "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-447 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2018 Stacey Abrams for Governor, All rights reserved "" | | Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Mayor Gillum stopped campaigning to help Tallahassee recover from Hurricane Michael. Now he needs your help to win the race for Florida governor.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
If you saw CNN's primetime debate for Florida governor last night, you saw the contrast between Mayor Andrew Gillum's inclusive, progressive vision for the state and his opponent's race-baiting, Trump
#
Friends,
If you saw _CNN_ 's primetime debate for Florida governor last night, you saw the contrast between Mayor Andrew Gillum's inclusive, progressive vision for the state and his opponent's race-baiting, Trump-approved politicking. I'm writing to you with an urgent request for Mayor Gillum if you'll give me just a moment to explain.
When Hurricane Michael hit Florida, Mayor Gillum focused his attention on Tallahassee to prepare the city and lead recovery efforts as his opponent kept negative and false advertisements on TV when communities were preparing for the storm. President Trump attacked Mayor Gillum on Twitter instead of helping with the recovery. So it may come as a shock to say that this race is close - **Mayor Gillum has a one-point lead in three different polls this month, and now he's back on the trail.**
**[When Mayor Gillum won on primary night, you came through for him. Can you help him again to win the race for Florida governor? Any donation, no matter the size, helps us win. If you've never donated before, now is the time you can have the greatest impact. Pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford today to split between Mayor Gillum's campaign and Our Revolution.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a843/bed43eb/8fe73a17/75fc0a2c/2456203575/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gillum?refcode=em181022-full&noskip=true")**
Mayor Gillum will be the first Black governor of Florida when elected, but this race is bigger than him. It's about the mayor's support for Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, protecting Florida's natural environment. It's about restoring the right to vote to 1.4 million of Florida's returning citizens - the largest disenfranchised voting bloc in the country - through Amendment 4.
This is a campaign being led by working people, young people, and people of color - exactly the voters we need to inspire nationwide with a progressive vision for our future. Every dollar and every donation truly does matter. Your time, talent and treasure will propel Mayor Gillum to victory on November 6th if we all work together.
**[Can you help Mayor Gillum and Our Revolution win this race? Rush a $5 donation or whatever you can afford to help get out the vote that will be the difference in this election.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a843/bed43eb/8fe73a17/75fc0a2c/2456203575/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gillum?refcode=em181022-full&noskip=true")**
Early voting has already started. Florida's last two gubernatorial elections were each decided by just one point, and it looks like this election will be just as close. That's what makes your contribution so important - not only for the history we make but the future we create together.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a843/bed43eb/8fe73a17/75fc0a2c/2456203575/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gillum?refcode=em181022-full&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a843/bed43eb/8fe73a17/75fc0a2f/2456203575/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a843/bed43eb/8fe73a17/75fc0a2e/2456203575/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a843/bed43eb/8fe73a17/75fc0a29/2456203575/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a843/bed43eb/8fe73a17/75fc0a28/2456203575/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Break the Majority
subject: Time's running out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203956/2fde7c66/498634c0/1568686d/2860063875/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/btmcand2?refcode=20181022_candidateemail_1&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=BTM+candidates+email+1&source=BTM+candidates+email+1")
---
friend, Tomorrow marks exactly two weeks from Election Day. As you already know, we're running candidates in all 170 districts. This is the first time in history we're running a full slate of candidates across the state. There's a lot going on right now, but during these final two weeks we need to drill down on what's really important: supporting these candidates and helping them cross the finish line.

[**Our candidates need you, friend. This can't wait any longer -- chip in to help Break the Majority!**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203956/2fde7c66/498634c0/1568686c/2860063875/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/btmcand2?refcode=20181022_candidateemail_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+Our+candidates+need+you+FIRSTNAMEfriend+&utm_campaign=BTM+candidates+email+1&source=BTM+candidates+email+1")

Meet some of our Majority Breakers:

**Helen Probst Mills, Senate District 25 - Moore, Richmond, Anson and Scotland Counties.** _An "over-committed volunteer" in her church and community, Helen wants to join the legislature to effectively fight for women's rights and advocate for minorities. A breast cancer survivor, she also wants to ensure quality healthcare is available to everyone in North Carolina._

**Mack Paul, Senate District 18 - Wake and Franklin Counties.** _A North Carolina native and local community leader, Mack chaired the Wake County Democratic Party in 2011, leading the charge to elect a majority to the Wake County School Board to ensure every child has access to a quality public education. Mack is a founding partner at Morningstar Law Group, where he has learned how to run a small business and solve problems through cooperation and compromise._

**Sydney Batch, House District 37 - Wake County.** _Sydney is a mom of two boys, a small business owner, an attorney, and a child welfare advocate. Sydney was recently diagnosed with breast cancer. She took a few weeks off of the campaign trail to undergo treatment, but has resumed campaigning. As an attorney and social worker, Sydney has dedicated her life to advocating for working families. If elected, she will fight to ensure that every North Carolinian can live a healthier and more prosperous life._

**Christy Clark, House District 98 - North Mecklenburg County.** _Raised in a family committed to volunteerism and community service, Christy has devoted the last five years to public service, leading efforts on gun violence prevention as a founding member of this state's chapter of Moms Demand Action and serving as the North Carolina Chapter Leader for the last two years. A cancer survivor and mother, she is also dedicated to making affordable healthcare accessible to everyone and returning our public schools to their former excellence. After receiving her paralegal certificate from Duke University, Christy spent many years focusing on helping small businesses form and grow in North Carolina._

Our goal is in sight now -- after almost a full week of early voting in North Carolina, the numbers are looking promising. But our margin for error is razor thin.

If we don't keep up this momentum, Republicans in the legislature will hold on to their supermajorities and continue to prioritize tax giveaways for the wealthy and corporations instead of investing in education and improving health care.

[**Let's make sure we get this done. Chip in now to help Break the Majority.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203956/2fde7c66/498634c0/1568686f/2860063875/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/btmcand2?refcode=20181022_candidateemail_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-+Lets+make+sure+we+get+this+done+Chip+in+&utm_campaign=BTM+candidates+email+1&source=BTM+candidates+email+1")

Thanks for all you continue to do for our state, Team BTM _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203956/2fde7c66/498634c0/1568686e/2860063875/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/btmcand2?refcode=20181022_candidateemail_1&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_content=4+-++ask++raquo&utm_campaign=BTM+candidates+email+1")
---

name: Brandon Davis, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Hey, will you bring it home in your community?
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3651/9e00690/550b6603/240034d1/510871608/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181022_21lies_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&source=em18_181022_21lies_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx")
Friends,

In last night's debate, Ron DeSantis lied 21 times in just 60 minutes -- averaging more than one lie every three minutes.

Floridians are tired of politicians like Ron DeSantis who lie as a means to advance their own political careers instead of moving forward on the issues everyday people care about.

Mayor Andrew Gillum made it clear in the debate that he'll be the different kind of leader Florida needs -- one who believes in science, one who will expand affordable healthcare to over 800,000 Floridians, and one who will make the big corporations pay their fair share to fund public education for a change.

We want to show Ron DeSantis that folks from all over are stepping up to fight back against his lies. We're looking for 21 people in your town -- one person for each of Ron DeSantis' lies -- to make a donation to Andrew Gillum for Governor tonight.

**[So, will you bring it home in your community and chip in $5 or more?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3651/9e00690/550b6603/240034e9/510871608/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-debate-2018?gpsid=13_55_4634&refcode=em18_181022_21lies_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181022_21lies_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+FIRSTNAMESo+will+you+bring+it+home+in+CI")**

Bring it home,

Brandon Davis
Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

Team -- the _Philadelphia Inquirer_ just endorsed Bob Casey.
